name: bitly
description: Reads Bitly organizations, groups, campaigns, channels, bitlinks, branded short domains, webhooks, QR codes, and group tags, and writes bitlink/campaign/group/channel/webhook/custom-bitlink/QR-code mutations, through the Bitly v4 REST API.

risk.read: external Bitly API read of organization, group, campaign, channel, bitlink, branded-short-domain, webhook, QR code, and tag data
risk.write: external mutation of bitlinks, campaigns, groups, channels, webhooks, custom bitlinks, and QR codes; create_webhook/update_webhook register or repoint an outbound event delivery URL of the caller's choosing and warrant review before use, every write ships with an explicit per-action risk string
risk.approval: required for destructive actions (delete_bitlink, delete_webhook, delete_qr_code, delete_bitlink_tags) and for webhook URL mutations; creates/updates of bitlinks, campaigns, channels, and QR codes are low-risk
